prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为29124名、30861名、26643名、27482名、39759名。2021–2024年位次在2.6万–3.1万间波动，2025年大幅后移至3 9759名，较2024年后移约12277名，主要因"再选不限"专业组位次大幅下降所致；该校在江西省物理类招生计划：2021年33人、2022年40人、2023年40人、2024 年49人、2025年54人、2026年57人。2026年较2025年扩招3人（+5.6%），连续多年扩招趋势延续，对竞争有一定加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校， 隶属于中国石油大学（北京），校本部软科主榜约第62名。克拉玛依校区位于新疆，地理位置偏远，属于"离省异地校区"，在报考中通常面临地域折价；该校在 声誉舆情和抖音热度数据中均未出现独立条目，说明社会关注度一般，无明显正面或负面舆情事件影响报考心理。该校以石油 石化特色为主，石油工程、油气储运工程等专业为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，石油工程等传统工科 热度平稳。江西省2026年普通高考总人数474900人，较2025年总人数（历史类+物理类=472480）略有增加；按近年比例估算物理类约26.8万人，竞争略加剧。；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，与江西省跨省距离远，地域偏好为明显劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年位次因专业组结构调整而大幅后移、2026年小幅扩招、考生总数略增、学校偏远属性持续等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准上略有回调但仍在高位。预测最低位 次约40084名，区间39584–40584名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间39584–40584名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（参考2025年一档专业位次约1.8万–2.1万，差距较大，录取概率较低），三档专业作为保底。 位次明显优于区间上限时可适当冲刺一档中的计算机类、石油工程等。注意该校2026年"再选不限"组仅大数据管理与应用3人，位次可能波动较大，填报时需关注选科要求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 29,124, 30,861, 26,643, 27,482, and 39,759 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 26,000 and 31,000 from 2021 to 2024, but dropped significantly to 39,759 in 2025, a decrease of about 12,277 from 2024, mainly due to a sharp decline in the ranking of the 'No Re-selection Requirement' subject group. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province: 33 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 49 in 2024, 54 in 2025, and 57 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan increases by 3 students (+5.6%), continuing the trend of expansion over several years, which intensifies competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, affiliated with China University of Petroleum (Beijing), with the main campus ranked approximately 62nd in the Soft Science Ranking. The Karamay Campus is located in Xinjiang, a remote area, and is considered an 'off-site campus' far from the main province, often facing a geographical discount in admissions. In reputation and Douyin popularity data, no independent entries were found, indicating average social attention and no significant positive or negative public events affecting admission psychology. The university is primarily characterized by petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering as traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity, while traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering have stable popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province General College Entrance Examination is 474,900, slightly higher than the 2025 total (History Category + Physics Category = 472,480). Based on recent proportions, Physics Category is estimated to have about 268,000 candidates, intensifying competition slightly. The university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Jiangxi Province, making geographical preference a clear disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in 2025 rankings due to subject group restructuring, the slight expansion in 2026, a slight increase in total candidates, and the persistent remote location of the university, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly recover from the 2025 baseline but remain high. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 40,084, with a range of 39,584 to 40,584.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 39,584 to 40,584, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (referencing 2025 Tier 1 major rankings of about 18,000 to 21,000, which have a large gap and low admission probability), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, you can appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors such as computer science and petroleum engineering. Note that the university's 2026 'No Re-selection Requirement' group only includes Big Data Management and Application with 3 students, which may cause significant ranking fluctuations, so pay attention to subject selection requirements when filling in.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were 6137, 6398, 7099, 6844, and 6732 respectively. Overall, they fluctuated between 6100 and 7100, with the lowest ranking in 2023 (7099) and a recovery to 6732 in 2025, stabilizing in recent three years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province: 7 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, only 3 students are planned, a reduction of 4 students (-57.1%) compared to 2025, a significant contraction that will intensify competition and push rankings forward (smaller numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with the main campus ranked approximately 62nd in the Soft Science University Rankings. The Karamay Campus is located in Xinjiang, a remote area, which has a more pronounced geographical discount effect for History Category candidates. The school has no independent entries in reputation public opinion or Douyin heat data, with generally low social attention and no significant public opinion events. Advantage discipline data is missing. The only major offered in History Category is Ideological and Political Education (planned 3 students in 2026), which is related to the Marxist Theory discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Ideological and Political Education major has average social popularity and is a relatively niche liberal arts major. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangxi Province Gaokao is 474,900, with an estimated 207,000 in History Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025. The school is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Jiangxi Province. Liberal arts candidates are generally more sensitive to region than science candidates, and the remote location is a clear deterrent for applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the relative stability of the 2025 ranking at 6732, the significant 57% enrollment reduction in 2026 which will intensify competition, a slight increase in total candidates, and the remote region, the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to move forward significantly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4624, with a range of 4124 to 5124.
